# Docs coverage allowlist
# =======================
# Symbol names listed here are exempt from the docs-coverage CI gate
# (the `Docs coverage canary` step inside .github/workflows/pr.yml's
# `validate` job √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù driver script lives at
# .github/scripts/ci/docs-coverage.sh). Each entry is a one-line
# escape hatch √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù only use it when the symbol is intentionally
# exported from src/Scrapers/Pipeline/ but not part of the
# user-facing mkdocs guide under docs/.
#
# Format
# ------
#   # Reason: <why this symbol is exported but does not belong in docs/>
#   <SymbolName>
#
# Rules
# -----
#   * One symbol per line, no leading/trailing whitespace.
#   * `# √¢‚Ç¨¬¶` lines are comments; blank lines are ignored.
#   * The script does whole-word matching √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù case-sensitive.
#   * Re-exports via barrel files (`export { Foo } from './bar.js'`)
#     are NOT scanned, so they never need allowlisting.
#   * Default exports (`export default √¢‚Ç¨¬¶`) are NOT scanned for the
#     same reason √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù there is no symbol name to grep against docs/.
#
# When NOT to add an entry
# ------------------------
#   * If the symbol is part of the public API and a consumer might
#     reach for it from their own code √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô document it in docs/
#     instead. The allowlist is for genuinely-internal-but-leaked
#     names, not a way to skip documentation work.
#   * If you're mid-refactor and the symbol will be removed in the
#     same PR √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô drop the `export` keyword now and let the next
#     incremental commit do the cleanup; the allowlist is meant to
#     persist, not absorb in-flight churn.
#
# Maintenance
# -----------
# Review this file at least once per release. Symbols that have
# since been deleted, renamed, or properly documented should be
# removed so the allowlist does not accumulate dead entries.

# --- Phase 5: ScrapeAutoMapper cluster shared internals (PR #277) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) ScrapeAutoMapper.ts
# into AutoMapperFacade/AutoMapperTypes.ts as part of the 11-sub-module
# split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù shared types + constants
# used by BfsFieldSearch, AccountExtractor, ContainerPicker, TxnMapper,
# etc. √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù not part of the user-facing @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers
# public surface. They are not re-exported from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: ApiRecord √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal alias `Record<string, unknown>` for API response shapes (used by AccountExtractor + BfsFieldSearch + TxnMapper). Not a stable public type.
ApiRecord
# Reason: DEFAULT_CURRENCY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal 'ILS' fallback constant for amount normalization; bundled into transaction objects via the shim, never imported by consumers.
DEFAULT_CURRENCY
# Reason: MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal BFS recursion bound for AccountExtractor field discovery; tuning constant, not user-facing.
MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH
# Reason: ScalarFieldHit √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal helper union (`string | number | false`) for findFieldValue / coerce* miss-marking. Implementation detail of the field-search algorithm.
ScalarFieldHit
# Reason: UntypedValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal alias of the shared JsonValue union (named to avoid Sonar S6564); retained for call-site stability across Scrape sub-modules.
UntypedValue

# --- Phase 6: PiiRedactor cluster internal scaffolding (PR #278) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) PiiRedactor.ts
# into per-category sub-modules under Pipeline/Types/PiiRedactor/ as
# part of the 13-sub-module split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS
# √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù the per-strategy classify/redact registry contract, brand types,
# sentinel constants, and helpers consumed only by Facade.ts and the
# per-category siblings. Not part of the user-facing
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface and not re-exported
# from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}. (The user-facing `redact()` entry point
# is documented in docs/ and so is NOT in this allowlist.)

# Reason: CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù each strategy module's PiiCategory literal, consumed by Facade STRATEGY_REGISTRY dispatch. Not user-facing √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù consumers use the unified `redact()` entry point.
CATEGORY
# Reason: JSON_BODY_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù JsonBody.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for the JSON walker.
JSON_BODY_CATEGORY
# Reason: URL_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Url.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for URL redaction.
URL_CATEGORY
# Reason: ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù ErrorLog.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for error/log message redaction.
ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY
# Reason: TOKEN_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts category literal for bearer-token classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
TOKEN_CATEGORY
# Reason: OTP_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts category literal for one-time-password classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
OTP_CATEGORY
# Reason: COOKIE_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts category literal for cookie/setCookie classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
COOKIE_CATEGORY
# Reason: PiiCategory √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù branded union type of all classifier outcomes; consumed only by Facade dispatch and the per-category modules' classify() return type.
PiiCategory
# Reason: PiiClassifierBool √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Brand<boolean> tag for per-strategy classify() return values; type-system-only, no runtime surface.
PiiClassifierBool
# Reason: PiiCountInt √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Brand<number> tag for counted-thing redaction outputs (e.g., name length class); type-system-only.
PiiCountInt
# Reason: PiiHintString √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Brand<string> tag for redaction-output strings; type-system-only, never imported by consumers (they see plain string).
PiiHintString
# Reason: JsonValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù recursive JSON union consumed by JsonBody walker + Facade dispatch; identical to the prior internal alias on the pre-split PiiRedactor.ts.
JsonValue
# Reason: JsonScalar √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù JSON leaf-type alias (string|number|boolean|null); component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody.
JsonScalar
# Reason: JsonArray √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù readonly JsonValue[] alias; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
JsonArray
# Reason: IJsonObject √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `{readonly [k:string]: JsonValue}` shape; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
IJsonObject
# Reason: REDACTED_HINT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `[REDACTED]` literal sentinel returned by default-deny; held in Types.ts so every per-category module can import it without a Facade dependency cycle.
REDACTED_HINT
# Reason: REDACTION_ERROR_HINT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `[REDACTION_ERROR]` literal sentinel returned by the unified `redact()` catch block; same anti-cycle reason as REDACTED_HINT.
REDACTION_ERROR_HINT
# Reason: OTP_HINT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `[OTP]` literal sentinel returned by the OTP strategy; held in Types.ts so per-category modules + AuthCredentials.ts import the constant instead of hardcoding the literal (CR cycle-1 #9 / √Ç¬ß13 sentinel ban).
OTP_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `-***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for negative magnitudes; held in Types.ts so log readers / fixtures / test snapshots share one definition (CR cycle-2 / √Ç¬ß13 broadened sentinel ban).
AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù `+***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for positive magnitudes; same reason as AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT.
AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT
# Reason: isPiiRedactionDisabled √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù boolean flag derived from PII_REDACTION env var; consumed by per-category modules to honor the bypass (credentials excluded).
isPiiRedactionDisabled
# Reason: CensorFn √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal type alias for the Pino censor callback shape; consumed by createCensorFn + Pino logger config wiring.
CensorFn
# Reason: CensorValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal type for the value-position argument Pino passes into the censor function; component of CensorFn.
CensorValue
# Reason: classifyKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù key-tail-to-category lookup used internally by createCensorFn to drive PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY dispatch; not invoked by user code.
classifyKey
# Reason: createCensorFn √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù factory that builds the Pino censor callback from the strategy registry; wired by the Pipeline logger config, never called from user code.
createCensorFn
# Reason: PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pino payload key-tail to PiiCategory mapping table; static dispatch data for createCensorFn.
PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY
# Reason: looksLikeToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for bearer-token-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeToken
# Reason: looksLikeOtp √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for one-time-password-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeOtp
# Reason: looksLikeCookie √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for cookie/setCookie-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeCookie
# Reason: PII_QUERY_KEYS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Url.ts list of query-string parameter names that must be redacted; static dispatch data for URL redaction.
PII_QUERY_KEYS
# Reason: SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù ErrorLog.ts allowlist of ScraperErrorTypes enum values that must never be log-interpolated (CodeQL #28); static dispatch data for redactSensitiveEnum.
SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS
# Reason: buildSegmenter √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù CommonHelpers.ts factory returning a Unicode Intl.Segmenter for accurate grapheme counting; used by length-class hints in Name/Merchant.
buildSegmenter
# Reason: graphemeCount √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù CommonHelpers.ts grapheme-cluster counter built on buildSegmenter; consumed only by per-category length-class hint logic.
graphemeCount

# --- Phase 6 follow-up: CR review #5 shared-table extract (PR #278) ---
# Reason: LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù CommonHelpers.ts regex table shared by JsonBody.applyFallbackPatterns AND Html.redactHtml; extracted from the two former duplicate constants per CR review finding #5 (DRY / no-duplication guideline).
LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS

# --- Phase 8.5a / Network canonical-10 drain (PR pending) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/Fetch/ and Mediator/Network/AuthDiscovery/. They
# are composed by their parent module (and consumed by the legacy shim's
# re-export) and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.
# The barrel (index.ts) re-exports only the historical public surface.

# Reason: getJsonHeaders √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/Headers.ts JSON Content-Type/Accept builder; composed inside fetchPost/fetchGet to keep the parent functions <=10 LoC.
getJsonHeaders
# Reason: LogEmitted √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/Logging.ts Brand<true> tag for log-emit functions; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (no exported primitive returns).
LogEmitted
# Reason: logApiCall √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost; centralizes the request-start LOG.info shape.
logApiCall
# Reason: logResponseIssues √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by parseGetResult/parsePostResult; centralizes the response-anomaly LOG.warn shape.
logResponseIssues
# Reason: IFetchGraphqlOptions √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/NativeFetch.ts option-bag interface for fetchGraphql; shared between the native call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchGraphqlOptions
# Reason: fetchGraphql √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/NativeFetch.ts thin wrapper over fetchPost with GraphQL Content-Type defaults; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
fetchGraphql
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPage √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts page-context evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchGetWithinPage
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts variant of fetchGetWithinPage with explicit request headers; re-exported for historical callers.
fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders
# Reason: IFetchPostOptions √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts option-bag interface for fetchPostWithinPage; shared between the page-eval call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchPostOptions
# Reason: fetchPostWithinPage √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts page-context POST evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchPostWithinPage
# Reason: EMPTY_RESULT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts sentinel literal returned by parseGetResult/parsePostResult on empty bodies; centralized to avoid sentinel duplication across sub-modules.
EMPTY_RESULT
# Reason: IParseErrorOpts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for handleParseError; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
IParseErrorOpts
# Reason: IParseGetOpts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parseGetResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchGet sub-modules.
IParseGetOpts
# Reason: IParsePostOpts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parsePostResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost sub-modules.
IParsePostOpts
# Reason: handleParseError √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared catch-block helper that emits LOG.warn + returns EMPTY_RESULT; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
handleParseError
# Reason: parseGetResult √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for GET-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.parseFetchGetResponse + PageFetchGet.evaluateGet.
parseGetResult
# Reason: parsePostResult √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for POST-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.fetchPost + PageFetchPost.runPostEvaluate.
parsePostResult
# Reason: WafBlockDescription √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/WafDetection.ts Brand<string> tag for WAF detection results; type-system-only, consumed only by WafBlockError construction.
WafBlockDescription
# Reason: detectWafBlock √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Fetch/WafDetection.ts shared detector invoked by fetchPost + fetchGet to short-circuit response parsing on WAF interception; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
detectWafBlock
# Reason: extractAuthHeader √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts per-endpoint header-extraction helper; composed by Tier 1 (discoverFromHeaders).
extractAuthHeader
# Reason: searchBodyForToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts response-body walker that finds WellKnown token fields (flat + 1 level nested); composed by Tier 2 (discoverFromResponses).
searchBodyForToken
# Reason: readMainStorageRaw √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts raw sessionStorage reader for the main page frame; composed by Tier 3a (discoverFromStorage).
readMainStorageRaw
# Reason: readAllJsonStorageValues √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts JSON-shape filter over sessionStorage keys in a single frame; composed by Tier 3c (discoverFromAllStorageKeys).
readAllJsonStorageValues
# Reason: checkOneValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts single-value token extractor with JSON-then-raw fallback; composed by Tier 3b (discoverFromAllFrames).
checkOneValue
# Reason: handleToToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Playwright JSHandle-to-token resolver; composed by Tier 4 (pollForAuthModule).
handleToToken
# Reason: TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth-body field-name table; static dispatch data shared by ResponseTier search logic.
TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS
# Reason: STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key-name table; static dispatch data shared by StorageMain + StorageFrames.
STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling timeout constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling interval constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL
# Reason: IStorageAuth √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts parsed JSON-storage auth shape; consumed by extractFromParsed in tryParseJsonToken.
IStorageAuth
# Reason: PrefixedAuthToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts Brand<string> tag for prefixToken's return type; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
PrefixedAuthToken
# Reason: prefixToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts auth-scheme prefix helper (CALAuthScheme/Bearer); composed by ResponseTier + StorageFrames.
prefixToken
# Reason: tryParseJsonToken √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts safe JSON-parse-and-extract for sessionStorage-stored auth blobs; composed by StorageMain + StorageFrames + StorageScanAll + PollTier.
tryParseJsonToken

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 2 follow-up (AuthDiscovery tier helpers) ---
# Tier orchestrator helpers introduced by the AuthDiscovery sub-module split.
# Each is composed by the wider discoverAuthThreeTier orchestrator and is
# NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: discoverFromHeaders √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts Tier 1 wrapper that scans captured endpoints for an Authorization-shaped request header; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers.
discoverFromHeaders
# Reason: discoverFromResponses √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts Tier 2 wrapper that walks WK-auth response bodies for a token field; composed by Orchestrator as the first attempted tier.
discoverFromResponses
# Reason: discoverFromStorage √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts Tier 3a wrapper that reads the main-page sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromStorage
# Reason: discoverFromAllFrames √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts Tier 3b wrapper that scans every iframe sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllFrames
# Reason: discoverFromAllStorageKeys √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts Tier 3c wrapper that scans every sessionStorage key in every frame for token-shaped JSON; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllStorageKeys
# Reason: pollForAuthModule √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Tier 4 wrapper that polls every frame's sessionStorage for auth-module until it appears; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers as the last-resort tier.
pollForAuthModule
# Reason: AUTH_HEADER_NAMES √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth request-header name table (authorization, x-auth-token); static dispatch data shared by HeadersTier.
AUTH_HEADER_NAMES
# Reason: AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key name for the canonical auth blob; static dispatch data shared by PollTier (closure-captured via waitForFunction arg, see CR PR #280 #111).
AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 3 (AuthFailureWatcher split) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher/. They are composed by the
# Factory's createAuthFailureWatcher/createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher entry
# points and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mask-truncate length for diagnostic body previews; shared by BodyReaders + Inspector.
BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MIN √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive lower bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MIN
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MAX √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive upper bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MAX
# Reason: NO_PARSED_BODY √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts sentinel string returned by BodyReaders.safeParsedBody when JSON parse fails; composed by Inspector.
NO_PARSED_BODY
# Reason: IWatcherState √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mutable internal-state shape passed between Factory, Inspector, Waiter, State sub-modules.
IWatcherState
# Reason: matchInRecord √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (file-private since CR PR #280 #118); kept for historical trace √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù the symbol is no longer exported and this row is therefore inert.
matchInRecord
# Reason: safeBodyPreview √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + mask + truncate helper; composed by Inspector + Waiter for diagnostic previews.
safeBodyPreview
# Reason: safeParsedBody √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + JSON.parse helper; composed by Inspector for L2 (body-error) detection.
safeParsedBody
# Reason: RecordOutcome √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for recordFailure's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
RecordOutcome
# Reason: recordFailure √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts idempotent state-mutator + LOG.debug emitter; composed by Inspector (both layers) + Waiter.
recordFailure
# Reason: readDetected √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.detected (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.awaitFailure.
readDetected
# Reason: DisposedFlag √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for readDisposed's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
DisposedFlag
# Reason: readDisposed √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.isDisposed (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.executeAwait (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
readDisposed
# Reason: inspectAuthResponse √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts two-layer detection runner; composed by buildResponseHandler.
inspectAuthResponse
# Reason: buildResponseHandler √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts factory returning the Playwright response listener closure; composed by Factory.createAuthFailureWatcher.
buildResponseHandler
# Reason: buildWatcherApi √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts builder that returns the IAuthFailureWatcher public object bound to a page + state; composed by both createAuthFailureWatcher and tests.
buildWatcherApi
# Reason: AuthMatcherBool √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts Brand<boolean> tag for isAuthEndpointUrl + isFailureStatusCode return types; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
AuthMatcherBool

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 4 follow-up (AuthFailureWatcher public-surface paths) ---
# These symbols existed in BASE's monolithic Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher.ts
# and constitute the public AuthFailureWatcher API. Phase 8.5a/commit 3 moved
# them into focused sub-modules under .../AuthFailureWatcher/. The docs-coverage
# gate diffs per-file, so the new file paths look "newly introduced" even though
# the symbol names are unchanged. Allowlisted because the public API surface is
# identical; no new exports were added.

# Reason: classifyBodyAsFailure √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public body-pattern matcher; reused by L2 inspection.
classifyBodyAsFailure
# Reason: createAuthFailureWatcher √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary entry point; used by DiscoveryEngine.buildIoSlice.
createAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) frozen-replay variant; used by FrozenReplay.buildBaseFrozenDiscovery.
createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: AuthFailureClassifier √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) classifier-function type alias; consumed externally.
AuthFailureClassifier
# Reason: IAuthFailure √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) failure-payload interface returned to callers.
IAuthFailure
# Reason: IAuthFailureWatcher √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary watcher contract returned by the Factory.
IAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: IBodyFailurePattern √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) body-pattern shape used by AUTH_BODY_FAILURE_PATTERNS table.
IBodyFailurePattern
# Reason: isAuthEndpointUrl √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public URL-pattern predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isAuthEndpointUrl
# Reason: isFailureStatusCode √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public 4xx status predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isFailureStatusCode
# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 7 (Network √Ç¬ß11 cap tightening 20√¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô10) ---
# Reason: IAwaitFailureArgs √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù AuthFailureWatcher/Waiter.ts bundled-args interface introduced solely to keep awaitFailure within the 10-LoC per-function cap; internal-only √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no external consumer.
IAwaitFailureArgs

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 9 (CR PR #280 follow-up √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs export surface) ---
# Reason: logShapeAwarePick √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts canonical `discover.shapeAware` Pino emitter; composed by every ShapeAware caller so the structured event lives in one place.
logShapeAwarePick
# Reason: ShapeAwareTier √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts type alias enumerating the seven shape-aware tier labels carried on `discover.shapeAware`; consumed by callers to type-check tier arguments.
ShapeAwareTier
# Reason: NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Network/FetchConfig.ts AbortController-driven native-fetch timeout (30s); shared by Fetch/NativeFetch.ts so bank API stalls cannot hang the scraper indefinitely (CR PR #280 #124).
NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 8.5b / commit 3 (ScrapeReplay split) ---
# Reason: JsonRecord √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù ScrapeReplay/JsonTypes.ts canonical Record<string, JsonNode> alias used across every ScrapeReplay/* sub-module + Strategy/Scrape/ScrapeDataActions+ScrapeChunking+Account/AccountScrapeStrategy consumers; previously exported via "export type { JsonRecord }" from ScrapeReplayAction.ts (docs-coverage regex only matches direct "export type" declarations so the symbol is now flagged, but its public-surface status is unchanged).
JsonRecord

# --- Phase 3 / commit 13 (CR PR #286 finding F7 √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù OTP click timeouts) ---
# Reason: OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (5000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryFallbackClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS
# Reason: OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (3000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryForceClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 2a / C15 (PipelineContextSlotKeys √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù extracted from PipelineContextFactory.ts) ---
# Reason: PhaseStateSlotKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal string-literal union 'login' | 'dashboard' | 'scrape' | 'api' used by PipelineContextFactory.ts to type the four top-level phase-state result slots. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
PhaseStateSlotKey
# Reason: DiscoverySlotKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal string-literal union of the six discovery result-slot names (preLoginDiscovery, loginFieldDiscovery, scrapeDiscovery, accountDiscovery, txnEndpoint, dashboardTxnHarvest) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
DiscoverySlotKey
# Reason: PhaseEmitSlotKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal string-literal union 'authDiscovery' | 'otpTrigger' | 'otpFill' for the M1/M4 sealed-phase result slots used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
PhaseEmitSlotKey
# Reason: BalanceSlotKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal string-literal union of the five balance-pipeline result-slot names (balanceFetchPlan, balanceResponsesByBankAccount, balanceExtracted, balanceValidation, balanceResolution) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
BalanceSlotKey
# Reason: ResultSlotKey √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal union-of-the-four-sub-key-types fed to Pick<IPipelineContext, ResultSlotKey> to derive IResultSlots inside PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
ResultSlotKey

# --- Phase 2c-strict / Dashboard split (DashboardPhaseActions / TxnParser) ---
# Reason: IDashboardTargets √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal target-resolver bundle used by DashboardPhaseActions.sequential.ts + .targets.ts + .action.ts siblings after the 1991-line monolith was split to satisfy the 150-line file cap. Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IDashboardTargets
# Reason: JsonScopeValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal JSON-value alias used by the TxnParser.scope.ts / .accountId.ts / .harvest.ts siblings after TxnParser.ts was split to satisfy the per-file LoC budget. Same architectural role as TxnParser.ts (DASHBOARD-side harvest scope); pure cross-sibling type plumbing, not part of the public API.
JsonScopeValue

# --- Phase 2d-strict / Login cycle break (LoginFieldDiscovery <-> LoginSubmitResolve) ---
# Reason: IDiscoverFieldsArgs √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal bundled-arguments interface shared by LoginFieldDiscovery.ts (producer of executeDiscoverFields) and LoginSubmitResolve.ts (consumer of resolveSubmitTarget). Extracted to LoginFieldDiscovery.types.ts to break the type-only madge cycle introduced by the Phase 2d split (LoginFieldDiscovery imports resolveSubmitTarget at runtime while LoginSubmitResolve imported the type back). Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the public API surface.
IDiscoverFieldsArgs

# --- Phase 2 / CR fix (EndpointUrlHelpers √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù WK constant for pending/clearance-requests URL) ---
# Reason: PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal WellKnown registry constant in ScrapeWK.ts that names the apiPrefix/pathFragment/actionName triple for the pending/clearance-requests endpoint on the shared card-family backbone (CAL/Isracard/Amex/MAX). Mirrors the shape of pre-existing PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_BILLING/_API/_QUERY_KEYS/_HEADERS constants which were grandfathered into the docs-coverage gate by pre-existing on main; this addition is the same kind (Pipeline-internal WK registry plumbing consumed only by EndpointUrlHelpers.resolvePendingUrl). Not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pipeline is internal to the scrapers, not exported via src/index.ts.
PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING

# Reason: Internal probe-result interface for urlHasWkDateRange (Rule #15
#         object-typed return). Used only inside AccountScrapeStrategy.
IUrlWkProbe

# Reason: Internal predicate used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to detect
#         whether a captured TXN endpoint URL carries WK date-range params.
urlHasWkDateRange

# Reason: Internal helper used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to extract
#         the captured fromDate from a TXN endpoint URL (Hapoalim preview
#         window fix).
readCapturedFromDate

# Reason: buildPinoOptions / buildSilentOptions / buildActiveOptions √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù
#         internal Logging/RootLogger.ts helpers exported ONLY so unit
#         tests under Tests/Unit/Pipeline/Logging/RootLogger.test.ts
#         can pin the silent vs active dispatch contract introduced
#         by CR PR #337 finding 2 (pino-v10 STDOUT fallthrough closure).
#         Not consumed by production code outside the module; no
#         user-facing API surface.
buildPinoOptions
buildSilentOptions
buildActiveOptions

# --- Phase 12b: Mediator/Timing split (PR TBD) ---
# These 69 timing-budget constants were previously declared in
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Timing/TimingConfig.ts and are NOT new
# public API. Phase 12b decomposed that 481-LoC hub into 13 per-phase
# domain files (HomeTimingConfig.ts, OtpTimingConfig.ts, etc.) plus a
# shared cross-cutting module. The original TimingConfig.ts now re-exports
# every name verbatim via export * from for one release window, so the
# external symbol surface emitted into lib/index.{cjs,mjs} is unchanged
# (lib/index.d.ts hash byte-identical: 14819 bytes).
#
# The docs-coverage scanner cannot distinguish "moved to a new file"
# from "newly introduced" via export * from barrels, so it sees every
# constant as + ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS (introduced in
# .../AccountResolveTimingConfig.ts) and demands docs coverage. These
# names were never user-facing in the first place √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù they are
# Pipeline-internal wait-budget ceilings consumed by the phase mediator,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
# Allowlisting them keeps the perimeter honest without forcing 69 entries
# into docs/ for symbols that are scheduled for further consolidation in
# v8.6 alongside the barrel removal.
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_POLL_MS
AUTH_DISCOVERY_DASHBOARD_WAIT_MS

# --- Phase 12b: BasePhase helper extraction (PR TBD) ---
# These 12 symbols were previously module-private helpers + brand types
# defined inside src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Types/BasePhase.ts. Phase 12b
# sub-step 3/4 hoisted them into four sibling files under
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/ (PhaseTrace.ts,
# BalanceContextSlice.ts, ActionContextBuilder.ts, HandoffHelpers.ts).
# They are NOT new public
# API √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù they remain Pipeline-internal collaborators of the abstract
# BasePhase Template Method; lib/index.d.ts SHA-256 stays
# byte-identical after the move. The docs-coverage scanner sees them
# as "newly introduced" because it can't follow same-PR cross-file
# moves. These names were never user-facing; the public surface is the
# `BasePhase` class and the `IsPrePayloadValid` brand re-exported from
# Types/BasePhase.ts.
TraceTagStr
PHASE_STAGE_EVENT
RESULT_TAG
traceTag
BALANCE_SLOT_KEYS
BalanceContextSlice
balanceContextSlice
buildBootstrapContext
extractExecutor
buildActionContext
DidEmitHandoff
logHandoffSummary

# --- Phase 12b sub-step 4/4: BasePhase class relocation (PR TBD) ---
# `IsPrePayloadValid` is a Brand<boolean> tag the abstract `BasePhase`
# template method uses internally to confirm the PRE stage produced a
# well-formed payload before handing off to ACTION. It is exported from
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/BasePhase.ts so the legacy
# Types/BasePhase.ts shim can re-export it for back-compat. The brand
# is module-internal √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no user-facing scraper code constructs or pattern-
# matches against it √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù so dedicated docs coverage would be noise. The
# user-facing concept ("BasePhase template method") is already
# documented in docs/architecture/{layers,pipeline}.md and
# docs/phases/index.md.
IsPrePayloadValid
# --- Phase 12a: CreateElementMediator god-module split (sub-step 1 √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Scope + Locators) ---
# These symbols moved out of CreateElementMediator.ts into focused sub-modules
# under src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Elements/Create/. They are CROSS-MODULE
# INTERNALS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù used by the fa√É¬ßade plus the upcoming Hittest/Entries/Race extraction
# clusters. None are part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public API
# (Pipeline is internal √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public surface is src/index.ts, not the Pipeline tree).

# Reason: CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal default-timeout constant (3000 ms) for the
#         parallel resolveAndClick race; tuning knob, not a consumer-facing API.
CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT
# Reason: NO_FORM_ANCHOR √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù empty-string sentinel meaning "no form scoping"; internal
#         to the SelectorCandidate√¢‚ÄÝ‚ÄôLocator dispatch, never crosses a public boundary.
NO_FORM_ANCHOR
# Reason: LocatorContext √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal type alias (Page | Frame | Locator) used by the
#         per-kind locator builders so form-scoping can be applied uniformly via
#         Locator chaining. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorContext
# Reason: applyFormScope √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù helper that promotes a Page/Frame to a form-scoped
#         Locator (or returns ctx unchanged when no form anchor is set). Internal
#         to Create/Locators.ts; reused by upcoming Race/Hittest extractions.
applyFormScope
# Reason: buildCandidateLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal factory producing first-match locators
#         from a SelectorCandidate for legacy resolvers (login/preLogin/OTP/scrape).
#         Used by the fa√É¬ßade plus the next-commit Hittest/Entries sub-modules.
buildCandidateLocators
# Reason: buildCandidateLocatorsBase √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal factory producing BASE (no .first())
#         locators consumed by the multi-match nth-enumeration race path. Internal
#         counterpart of buildCandidateLocators.
buildCandidateLocatorsBase
# Reason: LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal OCP dispatch table mapping each
#         SelectorCandidate.kind to its locator builder. Pure dispatch table; not
#         a public extension point.
LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS
# Reason: LocatorKindBuilder √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal function signature for entries of
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorKindBuilder
# Reason: buildAriaLabelLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for ariaLabel
#         candidates (fans across getByLabel + 3 ARIA roles). Used only by the
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildAriaLabelLocators
# Reason: buildClickableTextLocatorsBase √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for the
#         clickableText kind (innermost element containing text). Dispatch-table
#         row, not a public API.
buildClickableTextLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildCssLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for raw CSS candidates;
#         row in the LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildCssLocators
# Reason: buildExactTextLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for exactText
#         candidates (getByText with exact:true); dispatch-table row.
buildExactTextLocators
# Reason: buildLabelTextLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for labelText
#         candidates (Playwright getByLabel resolves to the bound form control);
#         dispatch-table row.
buildLabelTextLocators
# Reason: buildNameLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for HTML name
#         attribute candidates (CSS attribute selector); dispatch-table row.
buildNameLocators
# Reason: buildPlaceholderLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for placeholder
#         candidates (getByPlaceholder); dispatch-table row.
buildPlaceholderLocators
# Reason: buildRegexLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for regex candidates
#         (getByText with RegExp); dispatch-table row.
buildRegexLocators
# Reason: buildWalkUpLocatorsBase √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for textContent
#         candidates (walk-up XPath across CLICK_ANCESTORS tags); dispatch-table row.
buildWalkUpLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildXpathLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal per-kind builder for xpath candidates
#         (prepends xpath= and relativizes under form scope); dispatch-table row.
buildXpathLocators
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 2: Hittest + Entries extraction ---
# These six symbols are NEW exports landed by the Phase 12a refactor of
# CreateElementMediator.ts. They live in Mediator/Elements/Create/
# behind the barrel and are internal mediator plumbing only √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no public
# scraper consumes them directly. They will be re-homed (Hittest /
# Entries) without API change in later Phase 12a commits, so adding
# docs pages now would be churn. The parent mediator's public surface
# (lib/index.d.ts) is byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 gate verified).
#
# Reason: IRaceDiagnostic √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal trace payload for
#         raceLocatorsWithHitTest (winner + fulfilled + hit-pass counts).
IRaceDiagnostic
# Reason: raceLocators √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal locator race primitive; first locator to
#         reach the requested state wins.
raceLocators
# Reason: raceLocatorsWithHitTest √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal race+elementFromPoint hit-test
#         + skip-link filter pipeline; primary path for resolve-visible
#         helpers in the mediator.
raceLocatorsWithHitTest
# Reason: raceLocatorsFirstHit √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal single-winner locator race that
#         short-circuits on the FIRST hit-testable locator (or visible
#         fallback) via Promise.any instead of awaiting every candidate;
#         sibling of raceLocatorsWithHitTest, consumed only by Race.ts +
#         Resolve.ts. Pipeline-internal, not part of the npm public surface.
raceLocatorsFirstHit
# Reason: ILocatorEntry √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal carrier pairing a Playwright Locator with
#         the candidate descriptor and browsing-context that produced it.
ILocatorEntry
# Reason: buildLocatorEntries √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal single-shot entry expander
#         (.first() semantics) used by resolveVisible-style helpers.
buildLocatorEntries
# Reason: buildLocatorEntriesAll √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal multi-match expander
#         (.nth(0..MAX_NTH_PER_LOCATOR-1)) used by resolveAllVisible /
#         resolveAndClick so legacy + modern sibling pairs both enter the race.
buildLocatorEntriesAll
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 3: Snapshot extraction ---
# Four NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-3 (Snapshot.ts under
# Mediator/Elements/Create/). All four are internal mediator plumbing
# behind the barrel √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no public scraper consumes them directly. The
# parent mediator's public surface (lib/index.d.ts) remains
# byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IWinnerInfo √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal {index,value,identity} bundle passed
#         to buildFoundResult so callers stay under the 3-param ceiling.
IWinnerInfo
# Reason: snapshotValue √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù captures the winning element's text or href
#         before the next click invalidates it (stale-element protection).
snapshotValue
# Reason: extractAndTraceIdentity √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù snapshots DOM identity + bounded
#         outerHTML, emits debug trace, returns identity for ACTION-stage
#         selector building.
extractAndTraceIdentity
# Reason: buildFoundResult √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù packages winner data into the IRaceResult
#         contract consumed by every resolve* helper.
buildFoundResult
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 4: Race extraction ---
# Six NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-4 (Race.ts under
# Mediator/Elements/Create/). All six are internal mediator plumbing
# behind the barrel √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no public scraper consumes them directly. The
# parent mediator's public surface (lib/index.d.ts) remains
# byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IRaceSetup √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù return shape of setupAllVisibleRace
#         ({entries, locators, timeout}); needed by resolveAllVisibleImpl
#         to destructure race inputs.
IRaceSetup
# Reason: traceRaceDiagnostic √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù debug-level race-outcome log emitter
#         (winner index + per-locator detail) shared by every race caller.
traceRaceDiagnostic
# Reason: raceEntriesToResult √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù race entries through hit-test, return
#         found-result for the winner or NOT_FOUND_RESULT; the shared
#         single-winner body for resolveVisibleImpl + resolveVisibleNthAware.
raceEntriesToResult
# Reason: extractWinnerSequence √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù turn race-winner indices into IRaceResults
#         with DOM-element dedup + selector-specificity ranking + cap;
#         consumed by resolveAllVisibleImpl.
extractWinnerSequence
# Reason: setupAllVisibleRace √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù prepare race inputs (nth-expanded entries +
#         locator array + capped timeout) for the multi-winner path.
setupAllVisibleRace
# Reason: enrichWinnerToResult √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù capture identity + value from one winning
#         entry and wrap as IRaceResult; shared by raceEntriesToResult,
#         resolveVisibleInContextImpl, and tryAttachedClickFallback.
enrichWinnerToResult
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 4 (transitional): Debug.ts shim lag ---
# Main has advanced to Phase 12c which migrated the logger cluster from
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Types/Debug.ts into src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Logging/Debug.ts,
# leaving Types/Debug.ts as a re-export shim. This branch is based off
# pre-12c main (017eb7e2) so Types/Debug.ts still carries the inline
# export function √¢‚Ç¨¬¶ declarations. The docs-coverage gate diffs us against
# CURRENT main (post-12c shim) and sees these three symbols as "introduced
# in HEAD" because the extractor treats inline export function as a new
# symbol distinct from the shim's export { √¢‚Ç¨¬¶ } from '../Logging/Debug.js'.
#
# These three entries unblock the Phase 12a CreateElementMediator refactor
# from a Phase 12c side effect that the orchestrator will resolve by
# rebasing this branch onto post-12c main before merge. They should be
# REMOVED in the rebase commit alongside the inline declarations.
#
# Reason: ScraperLogger √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù pre-existing logger type alias, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
ScraperLogger
# Reason: getActiveLogContext √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù pre-existing context accessor, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
getActiveLogContext
# Reason: runWithBankContext √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù pre-existing context binder, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
runWithBankContext
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 5: FieldResolve+Wait+Discover extraction ---
# Eight NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-5 (FieldResolve.ts,
# Wait.ts, Discover.ts under Mediator/Elements/Create/). All eight are
# internal mediator plumbing behind the barrel √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no public scraper
# consumes them directly. The parent mediator's public surface
# (lib/index.d.ts) remains byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IFormCache √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù per-instance mutable cache for the form-anchor
#         selector; threaded through discoverForm + scopeToForm.
IFormCache
# Reason: buildResolveField √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù wraps resolveFieldPipeline with
#         scoped√¢‚ÄÝ‚Äôwide fallback semantics and error catching;
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildResolveField
# Reason: buildResolveClickable √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù clickable-field resolver pinned to
#         the __submit__ fieldKey for WK.__submit__ fallback;
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildResolveClickable
# Reason: buildDiscoverErrors √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Layer-1 DOM scan + Layer-2 WK text
#         fallback packaged as the mediator's discoverErrors method.
buildDiscoverErrors
# Reason: buildDiscoverForm √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù caches the discovered form anchor and
#         catches non-fatal discovery errors; consumed by
#         buildFormCluster.
buildDiscoverForm
# Reason: buildScopeToForm √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù uses the cached anchor to re-scope a
#         candidate list (no-op when cache empty); consumed by
#         buildFormCluster.
buildScopeToForm
# Reason: buildWaitForLoadingDone √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù polls WK_DASHBOARD.LOADING up to
#         3 attempts (ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS between attempts);
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildWaitForLoadingDone
# Reason: ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù inter-attempt polling delay
#         re-exported from Wait.ts so the cluster owns its tuning
#         knob (the constant still lives in ActionExecutors for the
#         other action callers that share the same delay).
ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 6: Resolve+Navigation+Observation+Cookies+PhaseControls+Assembly+ActionMediator extraction ---
# Final Phase 12a landing: trims CreateElementMediator.ts from 915 LoC to
# ~38 LoC (√¢‚Ä∞¬§150 target) by relocating seven cohesive clusters into sibling
# sub-modules under Mediator/Elements/Create/. All new exports are internal
# mediator plumbing behind the Create/index.ts barrel √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù no public scraper
# consumes them directly. lib/index.d.ts byte-identical to baseline.
#
# Reason: buildResolveCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 6-method locator/click
#         resolver bundle (resolveField/resolveClickable/resolveVisible/
#         resolveAllVisible/resolveVisibleInContext/resolveAndClick).
buildResolveCluster
# Reason: ResolveBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         resolver cluster's slice surface.
ResolveBundle
# Reason: buildFormCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 3-method form-anchor cluster
#         (discoverForm/scopeToForm/getFormAnchor) bound to an IFormCache.
buildFormCluster
# Reason: FormBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         form-anchor cluster's slice surface.
FormBundle
# Reason: buildNavCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 5-method navigation cluster
#         (navigateTo/getCurrentUrl/waitForNetworkIdle/raceWithNetworkIdle/
#         waitForURL) with single-source waitForNetworkIdle reuse.
buildNavCluster
# Reason: NavBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         navigation cluster's slice surface.
NavBundle
# Reason: buildAttrCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 2-method attribute-read
#         cluster (checkAttribute/getAttributeValue) on locators carried
#         by IRaceResult winners.
buildAttrCluster
# Reason: AttrBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         attribute-read cluster's slice surface.
AttrBundle
# Reason: buildCountCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 3-method counting + href
#         cluster (countByText/countBySelector/collectAllHrefs) bound
#         to a Page reference.
buildCountCluster
# Reason: CountBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         count/href cluster's slice surface.
CountBundle
# Reason: buildCookieCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 2-method cookie I/O
#         cluster (getCookies/addCookies) over the browser context.
buildCookieCluster
# Reason: CookieBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         cookie-I/O cluster's slice surface.
CookieBundle
# Reason: buildPhaseControls √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the 4-method phase/stage/
#         discovery cluster, owning the ActiveState pass-through that
#         was previously transient on Create/index.ts.
buildPhaseControls
# Reason: buildStaticCluster √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù fuses PhaseControlsBundle + AttrBundle
#         so assembleElementMediator's spread count stays √¢‚Ä∞¬§ 6.
buildStaticCluster
# Reason: PhaseControlsBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for
#         the phase/stage/discovery cluster's slice surface.
PhaseControlsBundle
# Reason: StaticBundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù intersection (PhaseControlsBundle & AttrBundle)
#         for the page-independent merged surface.
StaticBundle
# Reason: assembleElementMediator √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù composes the full IElementMediator
#         method bundle from all six cluster builders (everything
#         except network, which the fa√É¬ßade layers on top).
assembleElementMediator
# Reason: extractActionMediator √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù relocated from the parent
#         CreateElementMediator.ts fa√É¬ßade into Create/ActionMediator.ts
#         as part of the Phase 12a sub-step-6 trim. The symbol's public
#         signature is unchanged; the docs-coverage gate flags it as
#         "introduced" because it now ships from a new file path.
extractActionMediator

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LoginScopeIntact.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô ScopeIntact/{Types,Otp,
# Disambiguate,Probe}.ts. The parent file shrunk from a 222-line
# mixed-concern module to a 33-line thin facade composing the four
# sub-modules. All 20 symbols below were previously module-private
# helpers; the export keyword exists only to let the sub-modules
# import each other across the new file boundary. The facade
# (validateActionScopeIntact) remains the sole user-facing surface
# and is already documented under docs/architecture/login-pipeline.md.
# Pattern matches the Phase 12a Create/ allowlist entries above.
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Reason: SCOPE_OTP_VISIBLE_LOG √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù diagnostic log constant consumed by
#         ScopeIntactDisambiguate; not user-visible.
SCOPE_OTP_VISIBLE_LOG

#         ScopeIntactDisambiguate; not user-visible.
SCOPE_OTP_UNKNOWN_LOG
# Reason: SCOPE_INTACT_FAIL_MSG √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù diagnostic message constant consumed
#         by ScopeIntactDisambiguate; not user-visible.
SCOPE_INTACT_FAIL_MSG

#         keys to fall-through trace logs; sub-module-internal.
SCOPE_OTP_FALLTHROUGH_LOGS
# Reason: PROBE_FAILED √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù sentinel for runOtpDetect's catch arm;
#         sub-module-internal.
PROBE_FAILED
# Reason: IScopeIntactArgs √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bundled state for emitScopeIntactFailure;
#         purely framework-internal type alias.
IScopeIntactArgs
# Reason: OtpScreenVisibility √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù tri-state outcome alias for
#         otpScreenVisible; purely framework-internal.
OtpScreenVisibility
# Reason: ProbeOutcome √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù flat probe outcome alias used by runOtpDetect
#         and unwrapOtpProcedure; purely framework-internal.
ProbeOutcome
# Reason: ScopeProbe √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù pre-check probe result alias for probeScopeIntact;
#         purely framework-internal.
ScopeProbe
# Reason: unwrapOtpProcedure √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Procedure√¢‚ÄÝ‚ÄôProbeOutcome translator;
#         framework-internal helper for runOtpDetect.
unwrapOtpProcedure
# Reason: runOtpDetect √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù single OTP detect probe runner; framework-
#         internal helper for otpScreenVisible.
runOtpDetect
# Reason: otpScreenVisible √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù composite OTP visibility probe; framework-
#         internal helper for disambiguateScopeIntact.
otpScreenVisible
# Reason: pickOtpFallthroughLog √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù visibility verdict√¢‚ÄÝ‚Äôlog resolver;
#         framework-internal helper for disambiguateScopeIntact.
pickOtpFallthroughLog
# Reason: emitScopeIntactFailure √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù structured failure emitter;
#         framework-internal helper for disambiguateScopeIntact.
emitScopeIntactFailure
# Reason: emitFallthroughLog √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù fall-through log emitter; framework-
#         internal helper for disambiguateScopeIntact.
emitFallthroughLog
# Reason: disambiguateScopeIntact √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù OTP-vs-invalid-creds disambiguator;
#         framework-internal helper composed by the fa√É¬ßade.
disambiguateScopeIntact
# Reason: getPasswordTarget √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù password target lookup; framework-
#         internal helper for probeScopeIntact.
getPasswordTarget
# Reason: probeCountTarget √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù selector count probe; framework-internal
#         helper for probeScopeIntact.
probeCountTarget
# Reason: probeScopeIntact √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù composite pre-check probe; framework-
#         internal helper composed by the fa√É¬ßade.
probeScopeIntact
# Reason: makeScopeArgs √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù IScopeIntactArgs builder; framework-internal
#         helper composed by the fa√É¬ßade.
makeScopeArgs

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LoginSubmitResolve.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô SubmitResolve/{Types,
# FrameMatch,Build,Core}.ts. The parent file shrunk from a 224-line
# mixed-concern module to a 41-line thin facade composing the four
# sub-modules. All 15 symbols below were previously module-private
# helpers; the export keyword exists only to let the sub-modules
# import each other across the new file boundary. The facade
# (resolveSubmitTarget) remains the sole user-facing surface.
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LoginPostValidate.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô PostValidate/{Detect,Gates,Flow}.ts
# Sub-modules are framework-internal helpers behind the LoginPostValidate.ts
# facade. The facade keeps its 2 public exports (default executeValidateLogin
# + named detectAsyncLoginErrors); these symbols cross-talk between the
# 3 sub-modules and are not part of the consumer-facing API.
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module lookup table mapping auth-failure classifier √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô human-readable layer label (PostValidateDetect).
AUTH_FAILURE_LAYER_LABELS
# Reason: Sub-module re-export of the async login-error detector consumed by the facade and PostValidateFlow.
detectAsyncLoginErrors
# Reason: Sub-module helper that scans a page for async error banners √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù used internally by detectAsyncLoginErrors.
detectAsyncOnPage
# Reason: Sub-module probe for the auth-API failure watcher result √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù used by PostValidateGates + Flow.
detectAuthApiFailure
# Reason: Sub-module DTO bundling validate-login flow args (config/mediator/input/page/activeFrame).
IValidateLoginArgs
# Reason: Sub-module helper that runs scope-intact + bounce detectors after the post-redirect form scan.
runLatePostChecks
# Reason: Sub-module helper composing the form-scan + late-checks half of LOGIN.POST.
runPostFormAndLateChecks
# Reason: Sub-module helper running the late-fire auth-failure + async DOM detectors before scope-intact.
runPostLateChecks
# Reason: Sub-module DTO bundling form-scan args (mediator/config/input/page).
IPostFormScanArgs
# Reason: Sub-module failure message constant for the missing-browser early gate.
LOGIN_POST_NO_BROWSER
# Reason: Sub-module failure message constant for the missing-login-state early gate.
LOGIN_POST_NO_LOGIN_STATE
# Reason: Sub-module tagged-union outcome of checkLoginPostGates (fail/ok variants).
LoginPostReady
# Reason: Sub-module function that runs the LOGIN.POST early gates (login + browser presence checks).
checkLoginPostGates
# Reason: Sub-module helper wrapping a failure procedure in the LoginPostReady fail tag.
failReady
# Reason: Sub-module helper running the main-frame error scan + SPA-traffic wait + POST callback.
runPostFormScanAndCallback
# Reason: Sub-module helper running the loading-gate wait + early auth-API watcher.
runPostLoadingGate
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LoginFieldDiscovery.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô FieldDiscovery/{Types,ResolveOne,Accumulate,Fold}.ts
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module accumulator type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù passes target map + form anchor through the fold; internal only.
IFieldAccum
# Reason: Sub-module bundle for resolveOneField √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù keeps the body under the 10-line ceiling.
IResolveOneArgs
# Reason: Sub-module bundle for accumulateField √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù under the 3-param ceiling.
IAccumulateCallArgs
# Reason: Sub-module bundle for maybeDiscoverAnchor.
IAnchorCheckArgs
# Reason: Sub-module trace-tag lookup √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal logging helper.
FIELD_RESULT_TAG
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles an IResolvedTarget from a resolved field context.
buildPreTarget
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù picks the form anchor's CSS selector, or '' when absent.
pickFormSelector
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù maps a field-resolution Procedure into the IResolvedTarget sentinel.
preTargetOrFalse
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù resolves one credential field and returns its IResolvedTarget or false.
resolveOneField
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù accumulates one resolved field into the targets map + emits trace log.
accumulateField
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù lazily discovers a form anchor only on the first successful field resolution.
maybeDiscoverAnchor
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù composes resolveOneField + accumulateField + maybeDiscoverAnchor into one step.
resolveAndAccumulate
# Reason: Sub-module factory √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù builds the single-step reducer used by foldDiscoveryFields.
makeFieldStep
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù sequentially folds the ordered field list into the discovery accumulator.
foldDiscoveryFields
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù selects the active-frame id for downstream submit resolution.
pickActiveFrameId
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù FormErrorDiscovery.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô ErrorDiscovery/{Types,Scan,Probe}.ts
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module sentinel for elements missing a `class` attribute (browser-context).
NO_CLASS
# Reason: Sub-module raw DOM item interface √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù output of the in-browser scan callback.
IRawDomItem
# Reason: Sub-module evaluation-argument bundle √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù passes selector + sentinel into the browser context.
IEvalArg
# Reason: Sub-module CSS-selector constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù joined list of structural error-element selectors.
ERROR_SELECTOR
# Reason: Sub-module type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù discriminator for the kind of form error (formValidation/networkError/authError).
FormErrorKind
# Reason: Sub-module interface √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù a single discovered form error (selector + text + kind).
IFormError
# Reason: Sub-module interface √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù unified scan result for Layer 1 + Layer 2 error discovery.
IFormErrorScanResult
# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù canonical empty IFormErrorScanResult sentinel.
NO_ERRORS
# Reason: Sub-module Layer 1 entry √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù dynamic DOM structural scan for form errors.
discoverFormErrors
# Reason: Sub-module Layer 2 entry √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù WellKnown error-text probe for form errors.

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LoginPreOrchestrator.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô PreOrchestrator/{Types,Readiness,Discovery}.ts
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù failure message for the LOGIN PRE missing-browser early gate.
LOGIN_PRE_NO_BROWSER
# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù failure message for the LOGIN PRE missing-mediator early gate.
LOGIN_PRE_NO_MEDIATOR
# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù LOGIN.PRE prelude spec for the iframe-hosted login form.
LOGIN_PRE_FRAME_PRELUDE
# Reason: Sub-module tagged-union outcome of runDiscoverFormPreamble (fail/frame variants).
DiscoverFormPreamble
# Reason: Sub-module DTO √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bundled discover-form resources (config + context + page + mediator).
IDiscoverFormResources
# Reason: Sub-module function √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù probes the page for a Firefox-style network-error chrome.
probeNeterrorAndFail
# Reason: Sub-module function √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù runs LOGIN.PRE checkReadiness + preAction preamble.
runDiscoverFormPreamble
# Reason: Sub-module function √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù runs the post-preamble DOM-ready wait + field discovery + commit.
runPostPreamble

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12d split √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù FormAnchor.ts √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô Anchor/{Types,Walk,Scope}.ts
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module ancestor metadata interface √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù typed view of a single DOM ancestor.

# Reason: Sub-module ancestor tuple type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù wire-format from browser evaluate to Node.

# Reason: Sub-module sentinel √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù typed null for Nullable return types.
EMPTY_RESULT
# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù regex matching id-bearing form CSS selectors.

# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù XPath filter excluding non-fillable input types.

# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù XPath expression for ancestor walk (excludes html/body).

# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù minimum fillable input count for form-like detection.

# Reason: Re-exported from facade LoginFormActions.ts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public API documented at consumer sites.

# Reason: Re-exported from facade LoginFormActions.ts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public API documented at consumer sites.

# Reason: Re-exported from facade LoginFormActions.ts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public API documented at consumer sites.

# Reason: Re-exported from facade LoginFormActions.ts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public type returned by fillAndSubmit / fillFromDiscovery.

# Reason: Re-exported from facade LoginFormActions.ts √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù public union 'enter'|'click'|'both'.
SubmitMethod
# Reason: Sub-module type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bundled args for fillAllFields (mediator + fields + creds + logger).

# Reason: Sub-module type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù fill result with frame context for downstream submit targeting.

# Reason: Sub-module type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bundle of (didEnter, clickResult) returned by submit-phase runners.

# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù normalize ILoginConfig['submit'] to readonly candidate array.
normalizeSubmit
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù boolean-pair √¢‚ÄÝ‚Äô 'enter'|'click'|'both' lookup.
resolveSubmitMethod
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù convert ISubmitPhaseResult into the final SubmitMethod label.
resolveSubmitFromPhase
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù phantom-success guard returning a failure when no submit signal fired.
gateNoSubmitSignal
# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù emit the "filling N fields" debug line.

# Reason: Sub-module helper √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù emit the post-submit debug line (method + masked URL).

# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# PR #345 CR round-2 √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù narrowed Enter-press catch (Actions/ActionsBenignReject.ts)
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨

# Reason: Sub-module constant √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù benign-signal substrings for the Enter-fallback press path.
BENIGN_PRESS_PATTERNS
# Reason: Sub-module type √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù nominal brand for the press-rejection classification boolean.
