# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# Phase 12e √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù NavigationTransportProbe split (Mediator/Init/TransportProbe/**)
# √¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨√¢‚Äù‚Ç¨
# These symbols moved from the (formerly 1036-LoC) NavigationTransportProbe.ts
# into a focused TransportProbe/ sub-cluster (Types / Reject / Result / Url /
# Dns / Tcp / Tls / Probe) as part of a behavior-preserving facade split. They
# are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù phase runners, default dep implementations,
# per-phase input/outcome bundles, and shared sentinels consumed only by the
# sibling sub-modules and the Probe orchestrator. The user-facing surface
# (probeTransport, probeTransportWithDeps, and the I* envelope types) is
# unchanged and still re-exported byte-for-byte through the
# NavigationTransportProbe.ts barrel facade √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù those public symbols stay
# documented in docs/observability/init-navigation-forensics.md and are NOT
# in this allowlist. None of the symbols below are re-exported from
# lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù input bundle for the injectable tcpConnect dep (host/port/budget). Cross-module internal.
ITcpConnectInput
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù input bundle for the injectable tlsUpgrade dep (socket/host/budget). Cross-module internal.
ITlsUpgradeInput
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù parsed target-URL parts (host/port/isTls) threaded from Url.ts into the phase runners.
IUrlParts
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù per-run probe context carried across the DNS/TCP/TLS phases. Implementation detail.
IProbeContext
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù accumulating timing/result envelope assembled into the final INavTransportProbe.
IProbeEnvelope
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù '' sentinel for an unresolved address before the DNS phase runs.
EMPTY_ADDRESS
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù 0-ms sentinel for any phase that did not run. Shared by Result/Dns/Tcp/Tls.
ZERO_MS
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù 'other-error' outcome literal constant for the catch-all phase failure path.
OUTCOME_OTHER_ERROR
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù zeroed IProbeEnvelope seed used to start every probe run.
EMPTY_ENVELOPE
# Reason: Types √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù zeroed IUrlParts fallback returned when target-URL parsing fails.
EMPTY_URL
# Reason: Url √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù discriminated parse result for tryParseTargetUrl (ok parts vs failure outcome).
IParseUrlOutcome
# Reason: Url √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù internal target-URL parser consumed by the Probe orchestrator. Not user-facing.
tryParseTargetUrl
# Reason: Result √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù input bundle for buildProbeResult (envelope + outcome + timing). Cross-module internal.
IBuildProbeInput
# Reason: Result √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù assembles the final INavTransportProbe from phase outputs. Internal helper.
buildProbeResult
# Reason: Dns √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù production dns.lookup dep implementation injected as the default lookup. Test seam internal.
defaultDnsLookup
# Reason: Dns √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù discriminated DNS-phase result (resolved address vs failure outcome). Internal.
IDnsPhaseOutcome
# Reason: Dns √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù DNS-phase input bundle (host/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunDnsInput
# Reason: Dns √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù runs the DNS phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runDnsPhase
# Reason: Tcp √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù production net.connect dep implementation injected as the default tcpConnect. Test seam internal.
defaultTcpConnect
# Reason: Tcp √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù TCP-phase input bundle (address/port/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunTcpInput
# Reason: Tcp √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù runs the TCP phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runTcpPhase
# Reason: Tls √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù production tls.connect dep implementation injected as the default tlsUpgrade. Test seam internal.
defaultTlsUpgrade
# Reason: Tls √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù TLS-phase input bundle (socket/host/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunTlsInput
# Reason: Tls √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù runs the TLS phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runTlsPhase
# Reason: ApiDirectScrape √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù action-context payload type for the shape-driven scrape fn; framework-internal phase type relocated to a leaf in the 12g cycle-break (was already exported from ApiDirectScrapePhase.ts). Not user-facing.
ApiDirectScrapeResult
# Reason: ApiDirectScrape √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bound phase-action fn type; framework-internal, relocated to a leaf in the 12g cycle-break (was already exported from ApiDirectScrapePhase.ts). Not user-facing.
ApiDirectScrapeFn
# Reason: Form √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù credential field-fill fn; framework-internal, relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
fillOneField
# Reason: Form √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù single-field fill options; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillOpts
# Reason: Form √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù bundled fill-field options; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillFieldOpts
# Reason: Form √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù field-fill result; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillResult
# Reason: Elements √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù element wait options (visibility/timeout); framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IWaitOptions
# Reason: Elements √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù single-element page-eval options; framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IPageEvalOpts
# Reason: Elements √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù multi-element page-eval options; framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IPageEvalAllOpts
# Reason: BalanceResolve √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù per-bank balance-resolution discriminant ('account' | 'card-cycle') on IPipelineBankConfig; framework-internal config knob that gates the balance-resolve live fetch. Deposit banks declare 'account'; card companies declare 'card-cycle'. REQUIRED √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù every bank states its kind explicitly; absence is a config error, not a silent no-op. Not user-facing mkdocs surface (mirrors BalanceSlotKey/IDashboardTargets config types already allowlisted).
BalanceKind
# Reason: Banks √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù Leumi declarative login config (credential keys only; WellKnown resolves selectors); framework-internal bank-registration surface consumed by the integration test wiring (BankLoginConfigs), mirroring every other pipeline bank's *_LOGIN. Not user-facing.
LEUMI_LOGIN
# Reason: AuthDiscoveryGate √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù per-bank auth-completion-family discriminant ('token' | 'session-cookie' | 'api-direct') on IPipelineBankConfig; framework-internal config knob that declares how auth success is verified. REQUIRED √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù every bank states its kind explicitly; tsc enforces completeness. Not user-facing mkdocs surface; mirrors BalanceKind (already allowlisted above).
AuthStrategyKind

# Reason: LoginForensicTrace √Ø¬ø¬Ω gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildConsoleHandler
# Reason: LoginForensicTrace √Ø¬ø¬Ω gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildPageErrorHandler
# Reason: LoginForensicTrace √Ø¬ø¬Ω gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildPopupHandler
# Reason: SubmitModeGate √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù gated D3 diagnostic lever (PIPELINE_LOGIN_SUBMIT_MODE gate).
# Default 'enter-click' is byte-identical. CI A/B diagnostic only; not user-facing.
readSubmitMode
# Reason: SubmitModeGate √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù discriminated union type for the D3 submit-mode lever.
# Internal gate type; not user-facing.
SubmitMode
# Reason: SubmitModeGate √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù env-var name constant for the D3 submit-mode lever.
# Exported so tests can reference it without hardcoding the string. Not user-facing.
SUBMIT_MODE_ENV_VAR
# Reason: ActionsFill √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù @internal D3 requestSubmit helper, exported for unit-test access only.
# No docs-surface needed; gated behaviour, not public API.
tryFormRequestSubmit
# Reason: NetworkTimingConfig - body-read-race settle ceiling for awaitTraffic.
# After a matched (headers-only) response, the gate re-polls the live capture pool
# for up to this budget so the body-bearing endpoint settles. Framework-internal
# timing knob; exported only so the NetworkPolling race test asserts it. Not user-facing.
NETWORK_BODY_SETTLE_MS
# Reason: DashboardTxnMatch √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù shared TXN-page URL predicate reused by the DASHBOARD
# click-walker, dashboard href-extraction, and the ACCOUNT-RESOLVE nudge (dedup of
# TXN_PAGE_PATTERNS.some) and driven by the DashboardWK pin test. Framework-internal
# matcher, not user-facing public API.
isTxnPageUrl
# Reason: WindowParams √¢‚Ç¨‚Äù hasWindowParams detects a COMPLETE fromDate+toDate window
# (top-level query keys OR keys nested inside a JSON-valued param such as Max's
# filterData). Framework-internal predicate for the ShapeAware windowParamsMatch
# picker tier; exported so the ShapeAware empty-cycle regression test drives it.
# Not user-facing public API.
hasWindowParams
# Reason: BancsDateRead ‚Äî readBancsFromDate reads the captured GREATERTHAN*
# OrigDt from-bound of a BaNCS CURRENT_ACCOUNT body (Yahav). Framework-internal
# READ complement of applyBancsChunkRange; exported so the SCRAPE firstWave gate
# (AccountScrapeFirstWave) can tell a narrow dashboard-preview window from one
# that already covers the requested range, and so the BancsDateRead unit test
# drives it. Not user-facing public API.
readBancsFromDate
# Reason: BancsDateTemplate ‚Äî todayDatePart returns today as BaNCS calendar
# parts (local calendar, matching the month-chunk generator). Framework-internal
# helper backing the current-month to-bound cap; exported so the to-bound-cap
# unit test asserts against this exact source of truth instead of duplicating
# the extraction. Not user-facing public API.
todayDatePart

# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal driver context type,
# relocated verbatim from ApiDirectScrapeSteps.ts by the REST-GET file split so the
# import graph stays one-directional (Actions -> Steps -> DispatchArgs). Consumed only
# within the ApiDirectScrape phase; never re-exported from the package index. Not user-facing.
IDriverCtx
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal per-account context type
# (extends IDriverCtx), relocated verbatim from ApiDirectScrapeSteps.ts by the REST-GET
# file split. Phase-internal; never re-exported from the package index. Not user-facing.
IAcctCtx
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# customer-step dispatch args (urlTag + method + vars). Promoted to module scope by the
# REST-GET file split; consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildCustomerDispatchArgs
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# balance-step dispatch args. Promoted to module scope by the REST-GET file split;
# consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildBalanceDispatchArgs
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# transactions-step dispatch args. Promoted to module scope by the REST-GET file split;
# consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildTxnsDispatchArgs

# --- P2 Discount hard-model post-auth scrape shape (browser-bank migration) ---
# Reason: IDiscountAcct ‚Äî Discount scrape-shape account ref (accountId path id +
# displayNumber); consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IDiscountAcct
# Reason: TITAN_API ‚Äî Titan gateway origin const shared by the Discount shape's
# customer/balance/txns urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
TITAN_API
# Reason: extractAccounts ‚Äî Discount customer-step extractor (UserAccountsData.UserAccounts
# flatten). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
extractAccounts
# Reason: accountNumberOf ‚Äî Discount shape accessor returning the branded display number.
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
accountNumberOf
# Reason: customerUrl ‚Äî Discount customer-step urlTag (static Titan userAccountsData URL).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
customerUrl
# Reason: noVars ‚Äî Discount empty-vars builder (Titan GET calls carry params in the URL).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
noVars
# Reason: txnsUrl ‚Äî Discount transactions-step urlTag (the /Date full-history endpoint).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
txnsUrl
# Reason: txnsExtractPage ‚Äî Discount transactions-step page extractor (raw OperationEntry
# rows, terminal cursor). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE.
txnsExtractPage
# Reason: txnsVars ‚Äî Discount transactions-step vars builder. Per-bank shape closure
# consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
txnsVars

# --- P3 VisaCal hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: CAL_API ‚Äî CAL API gateway origin const shared by the VisaCal shape's
# customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
CAL_API
# Reason: IVisaCalCard ‚Äî VisaCal scrape-shape card ref (cardUniqueId query id +
# displayNumber last-4); consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IVisaCalCard
# Reason: extractCards ‚Äî VisaCal customer-step extractor (result.cards[] flatten).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
extractCards
# Reason: customerVars ‚Äî VisaCal customer-step POST body builder ({"tokenGuid":""}).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
customerVars

# --- P4 Amex hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: AMEX_API - Amex DigitalV3 SPA origin const shared by the Amex shape's
# customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
AMEX_API
# Reason: IAmexCard - Amex scrape-shape card ref (cardSuffix last-4 + per-card
# companyCode); consumed only by AMEX_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IAmexCard
# Reason: mergeAmexRows - Amex transactions-step row merger (approvals + israelAbroad
# vouchers + currentTransactionsList). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by AMEX_SHAPE.
mergeAmexRows
